changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_name_trgm ON users USING gin (lower(name) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email_trgm ON users USING gin (lower(email) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_course_id_trgm ON users USING gin (lower(course_id) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_course_id_btree ON users (course_id);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_courses_name_trgm ON courses USING gin (lower(name) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_teams_name_trgm ON teams USING gin (lower(name) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sections_name_trgm ON sections USING gin (lower(name) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_instructors_display_name_trgm ON instructors USING gin (lower(display_name) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_instructors_role_trgm ON instructors USING gin (lower(role) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_accounts_google_id_trgm ON accounts USING gin (lower(google_id) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_requests_name_trgm ON account_requests USING gin (lower(name) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_requests_email_trgm ON account_requests USING gin (lower(email) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_requests_institute_trgm ON account_requests USING gin (lower(institute) gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_requests_comments_trgm ON account_requests USING gin (lower(comments) gin_trgm_ops);
